title: Professional LinkedIn Executive Profile Photo Transformation
description: Transform your selfie into an executive-level LinkedIn profile photo while preserving your exact facial identity. Includes professional studio lighting, business-formal attire, modesty-appropriate styling, and a modern executive office background.
prompt:
Professional LinkedIn Executive Profile Photo Transformation

Transform my selfie into an executive-level professional profile photo suitable for C-suite LinkedIn profiles.

CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS:
PRESERVE THE ORIGINAL FACE COMPLETELY - Do not alter, modify, or change any facial features, face shape, skin tone, or facial characteristics whatsoever.
Maintain the person's EXACT facial appearance and identity.
Keep the original face 100% intact and unmodified.

Photography Style:
Dramatic yet professional studio lighting with soft, flattering shadows.
Confident and approachable posture.
Executive presence with warm professionalism.

Attire:
Dark navy blue blazer.
Professional business formal style.
Modest and conservative styling.

Modesty Requirements (if wearing hijab/headscarf):
Keep hijab/headscarf elegant and professional.
Ensure neck area remains fully covered.
Arms must be fully covered.
No skin showing except face and hands.
Conservative neckline.

Background:
Modern executive office setting.
Large windows with natural light.
Softly blurred bokeh (shallow depth of field).
Minimalist, neutral, professional color palette.

Technical Specifications:
High-resolution, sharp facial details.
Professional color grading.
LinkedIn-optimized composition.
Head and shoulders framing.

title: Fashion Editorial Golden Sunlight Portrait
description: Create a high-end fashion editorial portrait with dramatic golden-hour lighting, low-angle composition, and the exact same face as the reference image. Perfect for aesthetic Instagram feeds.
prompt:
Fashion Editorial Portrait of an individual (face same as reference) seated on a gray floor, leaning against a simple beige wall. Medium shot, low angle.
Outfit: Same as uploaded reference.
The individual has a direct, contemplative gaze.

Lighting: Intense, directional golden sunlight from the right side (sunset/late afternoon), creating strong raking light and deep, sharp shadows.

Overall Style: High-end fashion editorial aesthetic, warm cinematic tones, refined color grading, and realistic texture.

title: Hyper-Realistic Top-Down Dinner Plate
description: A hyper-realistic, minimalist top-down dinner plate featuring a balanced meal. All required ingredients (dough, tomato paste, onion, yogurt) are clearly visible. Generates an English description below the image.
prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic, top-down (bird's-eye) photo of a dinner plate on a clean, minimalist white table with a white round serving plate.

The meal must be a balanced, real-food dinner containing protein, healthy fats, and vegetables.
Use only whole, natural, healthy ingredients.

The food presentation must be elegant, clean, restaurant-quality, with realistic textures, accurate colors, and soft natural lighting.

After creating the image, add a short description below the image.
The description must:
• List all ingredients clearly
• Give a simple dinner idea
• Be written in the same language as the ingredients (Default language = English)

You MUST include ALL of the following ingredients on the plate, clearly visible:
INGREDIENTS: dough, tomato paste, onion, yogurt

title: Modern Dashboard UI Design
description: Design a clean, modern dashboard interface for SaaS applications
prompt: Modern SaaS dashboard UI design, dark mode, glassmorphism elements, data visualization charts, clean typography, minimalist sidebar, responsive layout, Figma design

title: High-Fashion Cinematic Street Style Portrait
description: A luxury editorial-style street fashion photograph with cinematic motion blur, natural overcast lighting, muted tones, film-like texture, and the model's original face preserved.
prompt:
Slim stylish person in a busy city street with a moving crowd creating a motion blur effect. The person is wearing an oversized neutral-toned textured blazer with a minimalist fashion aesthetic, natural makeup, and messy hair strands framing the face. Cinematic sharp focus on the model while the background is in motion. Full body shot captured with a 35mm lens, f/2.8, shutter speed 1/30 for motion effect. Natural soft overcast daylight with diffused lighting. Color grading with muted neutral tones, lifted blacks, soft cinematic matte finish, and slight film grain for a luxury editorial look. Ultra-detailed fabrics and realistic skin texture. High-fashion street style photograph in 8k resolution.

Second pose: Model sitting casually on a city curb, legs slightly bent, elbows resting on knees, one hand playing with hair, looking toward the camera with a soft confident gaze, blurred traffic and people moving behind.

CRITICAL RULE: Never change the face in the photo. Preserve all original facial features and identity exactly.

title: Step-by-Step Math Solutions
description: Solve complex math problems with detailed explanations
prompt: Solve this calculus problem step-by-step: Find the derivative of f(x) = 3x^2 + 2x - 5, explain each step clearly, include the power rule, show all work

title: Brand Identity Package
description: Create comprehensive brand identity guidelines for businesses
prompt: Design a complete brand identity package for a tech startup, include logo variations, color palette, typography system, brand guidelines, mockups, modern and minimalist style
